column1: Slava:  I think d13 at least leave a bit of aji in that wall. I'm just coming back to weiqi too

Slava: time to gain some influence I guess
C[kevinm92: bit of an overfocus on influence there i think. the crosscut joseki typically has you cutting at q4.
C[Slava: I figured I'd just be bold and stupid after attaching on top accidentally
C[kevinm92: since we're moving into mid game i thought i'd give a couple pointers on what i've seen in your opening.
kevinm92: you seem to pick a joseki by just looking at a library and picking the frist one that fits the corner you're looking at
kevinm92: instead look at where your end position is and figure out how it plays with your other stones.
kevinm92: you were fine after your misclick to play from that position but chosing a joseki that gave me the bottom gave up the use of the influence you worked to form.
Slava: I was aware that the left could end gote for me, but I dont know its variations very well. I'm too hung up on P5 though
